---
title: "Statistical tests"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/tests.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/tests.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/tests.pdf){download="tests.pdf"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Exercises
Go to the [task page](tasks/tests-task.qmd) for the exercises.
:::

## Resources

- [ANOVA as a linear model](https://stats.libretexts.org/Bookshelves/Applied_Statistics/Book%3A_Learning_Statistics_with_R_-_A_tutorial_for_Psychology_Students_and_other_Beginners_(Navarro)/16%3A_Factorial_ANOVA/16.06%3A_ANOVA_As_a_Linear_Model){target="_blank"}: explanation of why an ANOVA is also a linear model
